targets.rawSql:
select "MySQL Enterprise Audit" feature, if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS) 
and lower(PLUGIN_NAME) like '%audit%')=0,if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) 
from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component) and 
lower(component_urn) like '%audit%')=0, 'Not Installed', 'Installed'),'Installed') status,
'MySQL Enterprise Audit is a feature in MySQL Enterprise Edition that logs and monitors database activity for security, compliance, and auditing.'
Description
union
select "MySQL Enterprise Authentication" feature, if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS) 
and lower(PLUGIN_NAME) like '%authentication%')=0,if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) 
from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component) and 
lower(component_urn) like '%authentication%')=0, 'Not Installed', 'Installed'),'Installed') status,
'MySQL Enterprise Authentication is a feature in MySQL Enterprise Edition that integrates database login with external authentication systems (like LDAP or Active Directory) for secure user access control.'
Description
union
select "MySQL Enterprise Data Masking" feature, if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS) 
and lower(PLUGIN_NAME) like '%data%masking%')=0,if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) 
from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component) and 
lower(component_urn) like '%data%masking')=0, 'Not Installed', 'Installed'),'Installed') status, 
'MySQL Enterprise Data Masking is a feature in MySQL Enterprise Edition that hides or obfuscates sensitive data to protect it from unauthorized access.'
Description
union
select "MySQL Enterprise Encryption" feature, if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS) 
and lower(PLUGIN_NAME) like '%encryption%')=0,if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) 
from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component) and 
lower(component_urn) like '%encryption%')=0, 'Not Installed', 'Installed'),'Installed') status,
'MySQL Enterprise Encryption is a feature in MySQL Enterprise Edition that protects data by encrypting it at rest and in transit to prevent unauthorized access.'
Description
union
select "MySQL Enterprise Thread Pool" feature, if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS) 
and lower(PLUGIN_NAME) like '%thread%pool%')=0,if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) 
from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component) and 
lower(component_urn) like '%thread%pool%')=0, 'Not Installed', 'Installed'),'Installed') status,
'MySQL Enterprise Thread Pool allows MySQL Enterprise Edition to run on optimum performance at high load.'
Description
union
select "MySQL High Availability" feature, if((Select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.replication_group_members 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.replication_group_members))<2,'Not Installed','Installed') status,
'MySQL Group Replication is a feature in MySQL Enterprise Edition that provides high availability by synchronizing data across multiple database servers automatically.'
Description
union
select "MySQL Connection Control" feature, if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS) 
and lower(PLUGIN_NAME) like '%connection%control%')=0,if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) 
from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component) and 
lower(component_urn) like '%connection%control%')=0, 'Not Installed', 'Installed'),'Installed') status,
'Manages, limits, and monitors client connections to ensure stability, performance, and security.'
Description
union
select "MySQL HeatWave RAPID" feature, if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS) 
and lower(PLUGIN_NAME) like '%rapid%')=0,if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) 
from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component) and 
lower(component_urn) like '%rapid%')=0, 'Not Installed', 'Installed'),'Installed') status,
'In-Memory Query Performance Acceleration, Generative AI, and AutoML'
Description
union
select "MySQL HeatWave Lakehouse" feature, if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS) 
and lower(PLUGIN_NAME) like '%lakehouse%')=0,if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) 
from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component) and 
lower(component_urn) like '%lakehouse%')=0, 'Not Installed', 'Installed'),'Installed') status,
'Capability to read semi-strunctured from OCI Object Storage Bucket'
Description
union
select "MySQL Vector Store" feature, if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.PLUGINS) 
and lower(PLUGIN_NAME) like '%vector%')=0,if((select count(1) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component 
where logtime=(select max(logtime) 
from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.component) and 
lower(component_urn) like '%vector%')=0, 'Not Installed', 'Installed'),'Installed') status,
'Capability to read unstructured document, load to database as vector, and process'
Description

select VARIABLE_NAME, VARIABLE_VALUE, status, 
CASE 
  WHEN status LIKE '%Warning%' THEN 'Warning'
  ELSE 'OK'
END status2 from 
(SELECT VARIABLE_NAME, VARIABLE_VALUE, if(VARIABLE_VALUE like '/var/%' or VARIABLE_VALUE like '/usr/%','Warning - Should not on /var or /usr','Passed') 
status
FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables
WHERE (VARIABLE_NAME='datadir') and logtime=(select max(logtime) 
from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables)
union
SELECT VARIABLE_NAME, VARIABLE_VALUE, if(ifnull(VARIABLE_VALUE,0)=0, 
'Warning - Set binlog retention','Passed') 
status
FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables
WHERE (VARIABLE_NAME='binlog_expire_logs_seconds') 
and logtime=(select max(logtime) 
from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables)
union
SELECT VARIABLE_NAME, VARIABLE_VALUE, if(VARIABLE_VALUE=0,'Warning - Change default password lifetime to > 0','Passed') status FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where VARIABLE_NAME='default_password_lifetime' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables)
union
SELECT VARIABLE_NAME, VARIABLE_VALUE, if(VARIABLE_VALUE<5,'Warning - Password history shall be >= 5','Passed') status FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where VARIABLE_NAME='password_history' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables)
union
SELECT VARIABLE_NAME, VARIABLE_VALUE, if(VARIABLE_VALUE<365, 'Warning - Password reuse interval shall be set >= 365', 'Passed') status FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where VARIABLE_NAME='password_reuse_interval' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables)
union
SELECT VARIABLE_NAME, VARIABLE_VALUE, if(VARIABLE_VALUE not like 'aes-256-%', 'Warning - Set block encryption mode to aes-256-%', 'Passed') status FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where VARIABLE_NAME='block_encryption_mode' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables)
union
SELECT VARIABLE_NAME, VARIABLE_VALUE, if(VARIABLE_VALUE not like 'ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256','Warning - Set this variable to ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256', 'Passed') status FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where VARIABLE_NAME='ssl_cipher' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables)
union
SELECT VARIABLE_NAME, VARIABLE_VALUE, if(VARIABLE_VALUE not like 'TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384','Warning - Set this variable to TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384', 'Passed') status FROM `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where VARIABLE_NAME='tls_ciphersuites' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables)
union
SElECT 'FILE Privilege' VARIABLE_NAME, GRANTEE VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure FILE is Not Granted to Non-Administrative Users' status from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES WHERE PRIVILEGE_TYPE = 'FILE' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES)
union
SElECT 'PROCESS Privilege' VARIABLE_NAME, GRANTEE VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure PROCESS is Not Granted to Non-Administrative Users' status from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES WHERE PRIVILEGE_TYPE = 'PROCESS' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES)
union
SElECT 'SUPER Privilege' VARIABLE_NAME, GRANTEE VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure SUPER is Not Granted to Non-Administrative Users' status from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES WHERE PRIVILEGE_TYPE = 'PROCESS' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES)
union
SElECT 'SHUTDOWN Privilege' VARIABLE_NAME, GRANTEE VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure SHUTDOWN is Not Granted to Non-Administrative Users' status from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES WHERE PRIVILEGE_TYPE = 'SHUTDOWN' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES)
union
SElECT 'CREATE USER Privilege' VARIABLE_NAME, GRANTEE VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure CREATE USER is Not Granted to Non-Administrative Users' status from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES WHERE PRIVILEGE_TYPE = 'CREATE USER' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES)
union
SELECT DISTINCT 'GRANT OPTION' VARIABLE_NAME, GRANTEE VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure GRANT OPTION is Not Granted to Non-Administrative Users' status from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES WHERE IS_GRANTABLE = 'YES' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES)
union
SElECT 'REPLICATION SLAVE Privilege' VARIABLE_NAME, GRANTEE VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure REPLICATION SLAVE is Not Granted to Non-Administrative Users' status from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES WHERE PRIVILEGE_TYPE = 'REPLICATION SLAVE' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES)
union
SElECT 'SET_ANY_DEFINER Privilege' VARIABLE_NAME, GRANTEE VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure SET_ANY_DEFINER is Not Granted to Non-Administrative Users' status from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES WHERE PRIVILEGE_TYPE = 'SET_ANY_DEFINER' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES)
union
SElECT 'ALLOW_NONEXISTENT_DEFINER Privilege' VARIABLE_NAME, GRANTEE VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure ALLOW_NONEXISTENT_DEFINER is Not Granted to Non-Administrative Users' status from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES WHERE PRIVILEGE_TYPE = 'ALLOW_NONEXISTENT_DEFINER' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.USER_PRIVILEGES)
union
SELECT 'validate_password.length' VARIABLE_NAME, (select VARIABLE_VALUE from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables) and VARIABLE_NAME='validate_password.length') VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure validate_password.length is set to 14 or more' status
union
SELECT 'validate_password.check_user_name' VARIABLE_NAME, (select VARIABLE_VALUE from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables) and VARIABLE_NAME='validate_password.check_user_name') VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure validate_password.check_user_name is set to ON' status
union
SELECT 'validate_password.policy' VARIABLE_NAME, (select VARIABLE_VALUE from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables) and VARIABLE_NAME='validate_password.policy') VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure validate_password.policy is set to STRONG' status
union
SELECT 'validate_password.mixed_case_count' VARIABLE_NAME, (select VARIABLE_VALUE from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables) and VARIABLE_NAME='validate_password.mixed_case_count') VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure validate_password.mixed_case_count is set to 0 or 1, otherwise password can be too difficult' status
union
SELECT 'validate_password.number_count' VARIABLE_NAME, (select VARIABLE_VALUE from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables) and VARIABLE_NAME='validate_password.number_count') VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure validate_password.number_count is set to 0 or 1, otherwise password can be too difficult' status
union
SELECT 'validate_password.special_char_count' VARIABLE_NAME, (select VARIABLE_VALUE from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables) and VARIABLE_NAME='validate_password.special_char_count') VARIABLE_VALUE, 'Ensure validate_password.special_char_count is set to 0 or 1, otherwise password can be too difficult' status
union
SELECT VARIABLE_NAME, VARIABLE_VALUE, 'This value must be ON or 1' status from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where VARIABLE_NAME='require_secure_transport' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables)
union
SELECT VARIABLE_NAME, VARIABLE_VALUE, 'This value must be greater than 1. Zero means no limit' status from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables where VARIABLE_NAME like 'max_%connections' and logtime=(select max(logtime) from `${compartment}#${display_name}`.global_variables)
) a

panels.title: Security Recommendation (CIS Benchmark for Oracle MySQL Enterprise Edition)

list.definition: select display_name from config.target_database where compartment='$compartment' and start_date_time<=now() and end_date_time>=now()
list.label: Instance Name
list.name: display_name

query.query: select display_name from config.target_database where compartment='$compartment' and start_date_time<=now() and end_date_time>=now()
query.rawSql: select display_name from config.target_database where compartment='$compartment' and start_date_time<=now() and end_date_time>=now()
